what is the library timing: The library is open from 9 AM to 8 PM on weekdays.
how to register for coding club: Visit the Events tab in UniVerse and click on 'Join Coding Club'.
who is the hod of cse department: Prof. Rajeev Mehta is the current HOD of CSE.
when is the next hackathon: The next hackathon is scheduled on 28th July.
it was established in which year: It was established in 2022 by Dr. Amit Singhal.
is sitare university only for the comput: Yes, it is completely focused on Computer Science Engineering.
how to get admission in sitare universit: Selection is based on your performance in the JEE entrance exam and a video interview.
what are required documents for the admi: 10th Marksheet, JEE Score Card, Aadhar Card, Parent's Aadhar, Electricity Bill, Father's ITR, Photograph.
are there any interviews: Yes, our admissions team conducts video interviews for all shortlisted students.
are there any scholarships available for: Yes, a 100% scholarship covering full tuition, hostel, and food is provided for meritorious students from underprivileged backgrounds.
does sitare university provide scholarsh: Yes, only for underprivileged background students.
what is top package at sitare university: The top CTC offered is ₹21 LPA.
how long is the third year internship: It is a 12-month internship with startups in India and Silicon Valley.
what is CoCo Summer of Fun: It is a 3-month intensive program in the first year that boosts coding and communication skills.
what happens in second year internship: Students work on refining skills, solving complex challenges, and preparing for dynamic work environments.
does sitare offer global opportunities: Yes, the third year includes internship opportunities with startups in Silicon Valley, USA.
what is the placement support like: Sitare offers strong industry connections, training, and mentorship to support placements.
what is sitare university: Sitare University is a Computer Science-focused university created by global leaders from Silicon Valley, Europe, and India. It aims to provide world-class CS education to bright underprivileged students for free.
where is sitare university located: Currently, Sitare University operates from Lucknow in partnership with Sri Ramswaroop Memorial University. Its new 38-acre campus is being constructed near Dewas on the Bhopal-Indore highway and will be ready by August 2027.
how many students are admitted each year: In 2022, 24 students were admitted; in 2023, 44 students; in 2024, 160 students. The goal is to reach 1000 students per year by 2030.
what is the curriculum at sitare univers: The curriculum includes Python, Math, Data Structures, and English in Year 1; Java, Algorithms, Databases, Machine Learning in Year 2; Frontend, Systems, and more ML in Year 3; and a full-year industry internship in Year 4.
what are the specializations available a: Sitare University offers specialization in Artificial Intelligence, Systems, Human-Computer Interaction, Data Science, and Computer Security.
who announced the university establishme: The establishment of Sitare University was announced by Dr. Mohan Yadav (Chief Minister, MP) and Smt. Yashodhara Raje Scindia along with Dr. Amit Singhal.
is sitare a private university: Yes, Sitare will be established as a full private state university under the Madhya Pradesh Private University Act.
where is the new sitare university campu: The new campus is located on a 38-acre site near Dewas, along the Bhopal–Indore highway.
where are classes currently conducted: Currently, students are studying at Sri Ramswaroop Memorial University, Lucknow.
what degree is given to students: Students are enrolled in a four-year Bachelor of Engineering degree in Computer Science.
who are the people behind sitare univers: Sitare was built by leaders from Silicon Valley, European institutions, VCs, and industry pioneers to offer high-quality CS education to the underprivileged.
how are students trained in real-world s: Through a wide variety of individual and team projects where they apply classroom concepts to real-world applications with guidance from faculty mentors.
are there any featured student projects: Yes, Sitare encourages projects across tech domains. Students have built apps and AI platforms with faculty mentorship, and the results are often portfolio-worthy.
what is bitebase: BiteBase is a Django-based web app built by Nagmani and team under Dr. Achal Agrawal. It provides real-time info from trusted sources including contests, jobs, and news.
what is sakshatkar: Sakshatkar is an AI-powered interview platform by Raushan and team under Dr. Kushal Shah that automates interview rounds using NLP and real-time analytics.
what is gramai: GramAI is an AI-based English learning platform by Narendra and team mentored by Dr. Achal Agrawal. It provides real-time feedback on pronunciation, grammar, and fluency.
what is citygraph: CityGraph is a curated dataset project by Kirtan and team under Dr. Kushal Shah used for AI-based search algorithms like BFS, DFS, and A* Search.
what is image editor project: Image Editor is a Flask-based web app by Rajat Malviya and Sandeep Kumar under Dr. Kushal Shah. It allows users to edit, filter, and manipulate images with features like text extraction and face detection.
